message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["{\"X\": [\"Y\", \"Z\"], \"Y\": [\"Z\"], \"Z\": []}","[{\"intersection\": \"X\", \"traffic_density\": 0.5, \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": []}, {\"intersection\": \"X\", \"traffic_density\": 0.5, \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": []}, {\"intersection\": \"Y\", \"traffic_density\": 1.0, \"accidents\": [\"LANE_OUTAGE\"], \"priority_requests\": []}, {\"intersection\": \"W\", \"priority_requests\": [\"EMERGENCY\"]}, {\"intersection\": \"Z\", \"traffic_density\": \"high\", \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": []}]"], "focus":"duplicate records (same preliminary -> keep last), missing fields (neighbor-average / added intersection), malformed record ignored, LANE_OUTAGE halving at density=1.0"}, {"input_lines":["{\"A\": [\"B\"], \"B\": [], \"C\": [\"A\", \"B\"]}","[{\"intersection\": \"A\", \"traffic_density\": 0.8, \"accidents\": [\"LANE_OUTAGE\"], \"priority_requests\": []}, {\"intersection\": \"A\", \"traffic_density\": 0.6, \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": []}, {\"intersection\": \"B\", \"traffic_density\": 0.76, \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": []}, {\"intersection\": \"C\"}]"], "focus":"multiple records for same node keep lowest preliminary; neighbor-average uses already-computed outgoing neighbors; density >0.75 overflow candidate"}, {"input_lines":["{\"n-1\": [\"n_2\"], \"n_2\": [], \"LONG NAME\": [\"n-1\", \"n_2\"]}","[{\"intersection\": \"n-1\", \"traffic_density\": 0.25, \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": []}, {\"intersection\": \"n_1_extra\", \"traffic_density\": 0.0, \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": []}, {\"intersection\": \"LONG NAME\", \"traffic_density\": 0.7, \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": []}, {\"intersection\": \"n_2\", \"traffic_density\": 0.75, \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": [\"EMERGENCY\"]}, {\"intersection\": \"n-2\", \"traffic_density\": 0.751, \"accidents\": [], \"priority_requests\": []}]"], "focus":"format-sensitive names and additions to graph, boundary densities (0.0, 0.25, 0.7, 0.75, >0.75), half-up rounding cases and EMERGENCY handling"}]}
